title: Tetra Extras
description: Adds compatibility with other mods and Tetra
body:
![Summary Img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995c33a2847f7a2c68b08555debae6efd1e499fd.png)Introducing a mod designed specifically for enhancing compatibility between various mods and Tetra. You're welcome to include this mod in your modpack. The mod has evolved into one of my main projects, so updates will be somewhat consistent.

Also, there are some Spanish translations for versions 0.0.8 and above.

## **Required mods.**

[Tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra) (5.5.0, or higher)


## **Compatible mods**
  
- L_Enders Cataclysm
  
- Upgraded Netherite
  
- Advanced Netherite
  
- Create
  
- Quark
  
- Aquaculture 2
  
- Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty
  
- Enigmatic Legacy
  
- Epic Fight Tools 0.1.4 + Use Epic NBT for animations
  
- Mystical Agriculture
  
- Mystical Agradditions
  
- More coming soon


### **Next Update Plans**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

texture revamp

</details>
